name: Pakistan
q1_economic: GDP $410B. 24 IMF bailouts since 1958. $131B external debt. Moody's Caa2. Per capita $1,710 (162nd).
q2_psychological: Inferiority complex vs India (11x GDP gap from same 1947 start). Nuclear weapon as self-esteem.
q4_multi_party: Saudi nuclear shield (SMDA Sep 2025) + Iran trusted backchannel simultaneously. Structural contradiction.
q8_collapse_trigger: Iran discovers full Saudi nuclear pact. All three businesses collapse simultaneously.
q9_india_equivalent: India. Blocks India-led solutions in all forums regardless of whether Pakistan benefits.

verified_actions.action: Signs Strategic Mutual Defence Agreement with Saudi Arabia — nuclear umbrella implied
Hosts Islamabad Talks — 21 hours, zero deal
Deploys fighter jets to King Abdulaziz Air Base same day as Islamabad Talks
Military says 'chosen by God to protect Two Holy Mosques'
India confirms buying Russian crude regardless — Pakistan loses ability to claim India alignment
